productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Brown Casual Shoes
description: Training becomes all the more fun and fashionable with the timberland Castille Buckle Chukkas. With a leatehr upper and grippy outsole, it's one great trainer you can own. This pair comes a spare set of laces in a contrast colour to suit your style quotient.UpperLeather upper for absolute durability and comfortHigh ankle for better lower leg support and styleBuckle on the medial ankle to customise the FitLace-up system for a snug, customised fitFabric inner lining for absolute comfort Cushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with flex grooves, impact guidance line and, terraced and herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionshoe careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
